ItacPersonItem.Notes: Clouet is the engraver of the Intrecciati`s emblem. According to the entry dedicated to him on Wikipedia, Clouet was member of the bentvueghels, and had the `bentname` Zandzak. According to the specifcic entry on Wikipedia, `the Bentvueghels (Dutch for "Birds of a Feather") were a society of mostly Dutch and Flemish artists active in Rome from about 1620 to 1720. They are also known as the Schildersbent ("painters` clique").`
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
